---

## 1. ERD Description

{{Describe entity relationships in prose. Group related tables. Example:}}

- `projects` is the root entity. Each project has many `requirement_inputs`, `pipeline_steps`, and `documents`.
- `agents` are globally defined. Each agent has many `agent_runs` and `chat_messages`.
- `documents` are linked to a `project` and an `agent_run`. Documents have many `document_versions`.
- `traceability_links` is a many-to-many join that links any two artifacts by their `source_id` and `target_id`.
